transcript: I... I don't want to hear anything.
Well...what... you're... You say you're gonna... eat bees? Well, that kills them. That's not rentin' 'em.
No, I do not have pellet pistols.
You're gonna put fish in your mouth?
Uh, okay. You can come down and buy fish, rent fish. I don't care.
Spitting up lotion? Well, we're aerial photographers. Do you know what that means? It's...
No, I'm afraid we don't do that kind of photography.
What's your name, by the way?
Uh... well... Nipper, I'm afraid we can't help you. You'll have to find someone else.
--have to... I'm gonna have to get on with my work. So, you'll have to call someone else.
Well, if-- '[beep]' --your job is to deliver the package, you should know where I live, right?
And what's the name on the package?
My lotion? Where is this lotion coming from?
Well... why... why do I keep getting all these strange noises?
Uh, why are all these strange noises... I hear gagging.
I... I don't want to hear anything.
Well...what... you're... You say you're gonna... eat bees? Well, that kills them. That's not rentin' 'em.
No, I do not have pellet pistols.
You're gonna put fish in your mouth?
Uh, okay. You can come down and buy fish, rent fish. I don't care.
